content.scenarioHint: 旅客在机场柜台办理登机手续时，想了解是否必须购买旅行保险以及基础保险包含哪些保障内容

options.text: Do I really need to buy travel insurance for this trip, and what does the basic plan cover?
Is travel insurance expensive? I don't think I can afford it.
Can you recommend the best insurance plan available?
I already have insurance, so I don't need this one.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接询问必要性（Do I really need...）和保障范围（what does the basic plan cover?），符合场景中旅客的核心需求。干扰项2聚焦价格，偏离主题；干扰项3要求推荐最佳方案，属于过度延伸；干扰项4是陈述已拥有保险，未提出任何问题，不符合'user_asks'模式。

options.text: Yes, even short trips can involve medical emergencies or sudden itinerary changes.
No, three days is too short—insurance won't kick in before you leave.
Only if you're carrying expensive electronics.
Ask your friend who went last year—they know better.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调意外风险与时长无关，符合场景核心逻辑。干扰项1错误暗示保险有等待期；干扰项2��保障范围局限在贵重物品，忽略医疗和行程变更；干扰项4推卸责任，非专业回应。
content.speakerText: Is travel insurance worth it if I'm only staying for three days?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我只待三天，买旅游保险值得吗？
